description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA Build that can be called by other workflows. It takes matrix, repo-ref, and pytorch-channel-version inputs and uses a matrix strategy to build CUDA wheels for FBGEMM GPU on various host machines and architectures. The workflow runs on a containerized Amazon Linux environment, sets up Miniconda, installs dependencies, and builds the FBGEMM GPU wheel.
